title: Here Come the Huggetts
writer: Mabel Constanduros, Denis Constanduros, Peter Rogers
actors: Jack Warner, Kathleen Harrison, Jane Hylton
plot: The return of the Huggett family. After first meeting the family at the Holiday Camp, this is on the home front. The Huggetts are about to have their first telephone installed. In today's high technology age, it is an interesting ...
